arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sets his stall out with Man City stars ahead of $1bn Club World Cup
arts.sum: Manchester City manager will tee it up in America and allow his tired players plenty of down-time at FIFA's one billon dollar 32-team tournament

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's response to Jack Grealish struggles speak volumes about his Man City future
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola refused to talk about photos of Jack Grealish in a north-east club and admits he does not know what the long-term future holds for the 29-year-old England star

arts.ttl: 'People change' - Jack Grealish gets blunt Man City reality from Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Jack Grealish and the new signings at the club ahead of Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Guardiola will judge Grealish 'on the pitch'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he will not control players' private lives after images of Jack Grealish at a social club were shared on social media.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Savvy Nuno Espirito Santo will set up Nottingham Forest to exploit Man City's counter-attacking problems
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: I cannot praise Nuno Espirito Santo enough for how he is achieving this with a relatively pragmatic approach for which he makes no apologies

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola breaks silence on Jack Grealish as Man City boss makes telling admission following England star's Newcastle bender
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Grealish frequented a pub in Gorton, two miles from the Etihad Stadium, before travelling to a social club on Wearside and finishing a night in Newcastle on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Jack Grealish can enjoy a night out but must deliver on the pitch
arts.sum: Pictures emerged this week of the England international apparently visiting a number of venues in the north east last weekend.

arts.ttl: ‘A day off is a day off’: Pep Guardiola relaxed over Jack Grealish pub pictures
arts.sum: City manager says players judged on pitch performance ‘I’m not going to control what they do in their private life’ Pep Guardiola is not concerned about images that emerged this week showing Jack Grealish socialising, with Manchester City’s manager stating he judges players on how they train and play. Grealish had two days off after last Saturday’s 3-1 FA Cup fifth round win over Plymouth. On Sunday he was pictured in a pub in east Manchester and then at two different places, both of which also served alcohol, in the north-east later that day. Guardiola was asked if he is at ease regarding these pictures of Grealish, who was City’s record signing when he joined the club from Aston Villa for £100m in August 2021. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Report: What Jack Grealish will have to do now if he wants to join Tottenham Hotspur
Exclusive: Joshua Kimmich has made decision over his future as Arsenal, Man City and Liverpool contacted by his camp
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool have been contacted by Joshua Kimmich’s camp regarding the decision he has made over...
